title: Huawei QSFP-100G-SR4-eKit, QSFP28 optical module, Multi-Mode, 100m, 100G, MPO
category: Huawei / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / QSFP28
description: Huawei QSFP-100G-SR4-eKit is a multi-mode QSFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 100Gbps , 4 channels of 25Gbps, 850nm wavelength and a MPO-8/12 Type B connector for connection up to a distance of 100m . The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP28 For cable type Multi Mode Transmission speed 100 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 Distance [km] 0,1 Transfer type 12-fiber, 8-fiber Polishing type PC Tx power [dBm] 8,4 up to 2,4 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 8.5 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors MPO Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
